title: Loves the Void
summary: When it’s just you, your spacesuit, and the panorama of stars wheeling out forever and always, you are at peace.
tiers: Tier 3: Space Fighting or Fusion Armor
Tier 6: Weightless Shot or Reactive Field
gm_intrusions: Spacesuits develop glitches. Air refill cartridges sometimes misreport capacity. Micrometeorites are common in space.
text: When it’s just you, your spacesuit, and the panorama of stars wheeling out forever and always, you are at peace. Type Swap Option: Have Spacesuit, Will Travel
